startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: URLs of the directories to scrape (e.g., 'https://example.com/directory').

nameSelector.title: Name Field Selector
nameSelector.description: CSS selector for extracting the name.

locationSelector.title: Location Field Selector
locationSelector.description: CSS selector for extracting the location or address.

phoneSelector.title: Phone Field Selector
phoneSelector.description: CSS selector for extracting the phone number.

emailSelector.title: Email Field Selector
emailSelector.description: CSS selector for extracting the email address.

websiteSelector.title: Website Field Selector
websiteSelector.description: CSS selector for extracting the website URL.

paginationSelector.title: Pagination Selector
paginationSelector.description: CSS selector for identifying the 'Next' page link.
